title: JOYIN 2 Bubble Guns with 2 Bottles Bubble Refill Solution (260ml Total), Bubble Machine for Toddlers 3+, Bubble Blaster Party Favors, Summer Toy, Outdoors Activity, Easter, Birthday Gift
features: Bubble Guns Kit includes 2 Bubble Guns, 2 Bottles of 130 ml Bubble Solution.
Easy to Use. Easy Attach. Super Durable. Fire a Barrage of Bubbles. Higher Quality.
Extremely Fun: Perfect Bubble Toy and Family Fun and Outdoor Activity Toys.

Super Value Summer Toy Pack for Party Favors. Perfect for Themed Party, Activity, Ceremony, Carnival, Birthday Parties, Party Favors, Camping Trips, Halloween, Weddings, School Classroom, Easter Basket Stuffers, Outdoor Water Toy Game Activities, Beach, Pack, Backyard Bubble Party and More!!!
CHILD SAFE: Non-Toxic. Solution Meet All Safety Tests (TRA, USP51, USP61 etc.). Very Safe on Kids’ Skin and Face.
description: Product Description Reflux Pipeline The bubble liquid circles back in a cycle to be used again for another bubble shooting round. Bubble Solution Container The rotating closure securely attaches the bubble solution to the gun.
